_description: Final probability estimates for Spain vs Austria 2026-07-02 JTC Round of 32

questions.question: Will Lamine Yamal (Spain) have 2 or more shots on target in regulation?
Will Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) score a goal in regulation?
questions.key_source: Smarkets Anytime goalscorer Oyarzabal liquid mid=0.4536

questions.question: Will Marcel Sabitzer (Austria) score or assist a goal in regulation?
questions.key_source: Smarkets Score_or_assist Sabitzer offer=0.2222 (×0.945=0.210). RULE7+RULE15 shade to 0.200

questions.question: Will the match have 3 or more total goals in regulation?
questions.key_source: Smarkets OU2.5 Over mid=0.5765 (model cross-check: Poisson λ=2.988 → 0.574)

questions.question: Will Spain score the first goal of the match?
Will Spain have 8 or more shots on target in regulation?
questions.key_source: Spain SOT OU6.5 Over=0.4365 → Poisson fit λ=6.27 → P(SOT≥8)=0.294. ESPN: [7,8,1]

questions.question: Will Austria have 4 or more shots on target in regulation?
Will Spain have 7 or more corner kicks in regulation?
questions.key_source: Spain_corners_OU6.5 Over mid=0.4294. ESPN: Spain corners [11,6,6], avg=7.67

questions.question: Will Spain be ahead at halftime?
Will both teams score in regulation?
Will Spain score in both halves in regulation?
Will there be 4 or more total cards in regulation?
questions.key_source: Smarkets Cards OU3.5 Over mid=0.2542. ESPN: Spain avg YC=0.67, Austria avg YC=1.33

questions.question: Will there be 4 or more offside calls in regulation?
questions.key_source: ESPN: Spain game totals [5,5,7] avg=5.67. Spain own=2 consistent. Austria vs Spain ~2. λ=4.0 → P(4+)=0.567. Conservative to 0.55.

questions.question: Will a goal be scored before the first hydration break?
questions.key_source: 1H_OU0.5 Over=0.7463 → Poisson time-scaling to 24': P=0.519. TIMING_EARLY: 100% beat-crowd record.

rule_summary.rule7: FIRES — Austria 7.28% win. Suppress Q3 (Sabitzer) and Q7 (Austria SOT).
rule_summary.rule12: FLAGGED on Q6 — Spain SOT bimodal, but Austria ≠ Uruguay
rule_summary.rule15: FIRES (Scenario A) on Q7 — Austria blowout underdog, suppress forward SOT
